reading.title: Reading: Learning a new skill
reading.passage: I started learning English when I was ten years old. I decided to learn it because I wanted to travel one day. I studied for about five hours every week, and I still remember my first teacher.

questions.question: The writer started learning English at ten.
questions.explanation: "I started learning English when I was ten years old."

questions.question: Why did the writer learn English?
questions.explanation: "because I wanted to travel one day."

reading.title: Reading: A common mistake
reading.passage: I didn't go to the meeting yesterday. I didn't have any time, and I was very busy. I told my manager, but I didn't explain it very well. He wasn't angry about it.

questions.question: The writer went to the meeting.
questions.explanation: "I didn't go to the meeting yesterday."
